nodes.name: Plants That Heal - Earth's Pharmacy
nodes.detournement: Turned into PATENTS by pharmaceutical industry
nodes.lesson: The earth provided. Then they took it. Made it EXPENSIVE.
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: Knowledge was STOLEN from the earth. Made into MERCHANDISE.

nodes.name: Seasons & Cycles - Earth's Rhythm
nodes.natural_time: NOT quarterly earnings. NOT fiscal years.
nodes.lesson: Earth has a rhythm. Money ignores it. Then extracts faster than earth can regenerate.
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: Time itself was stolen. Made into DEBT.

nodes.name: Ancestral Knowledge - Farmers & Herbalists
nodes.preserved_by: Grandmothers, indigenous peoples, farmers refusing industrial model
nodes.detournement: Replaced by GMOs, patents, monoculture, pesticides
nodes.lesson: They had it RIGHT. Then they said it was BACKWARD. Made it ILLEGAL.
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: Knowledge wasn't WRONG. It was DANGEROUS to profit.

nodes.name: The Detournement - How Knowledge Became Merchandise
nodes.mechanism: Enclose, control, monetize. Make it PROPRIETARY.
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: Knowledge was FREE. Then they PRICED it. Then they said you NEED it.

nodes.name: Money as Knowledge-Thief
how_it_works: Extract wealth (money flows to banks, not earth)
nodes.result: Knowledge is no longer ALIVE. It's DEAD. MONETIZED.
nodes.cost: Earth exhausted. Communities impoverished. Life diminished.
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: Money doesn't CREATE. It EXTRACTS. Even knowledge.

nodes.name: Eliot-jr's Question
nodes.question: If I accept that knowledge is meant to be MONETIZED - am I accepting the lie?
implications: If knowledge = commodity, then earth = resource
If earth = resource, then extraction = normal
If extraction = normal, then devastation = acceptable
If devastation = acceptable, then I accept DEATH
nodes.eliot_jr_insight: I must choose: accept the theft, or defend the LIVING knowledge.
